title: Smoked Turkey Tagine
description: A flavorful Moroccan-inspired stew made with tender smoked turkey and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the Mediterranean olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped capers and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the Mediterranean spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the smoked turkey neck and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the xtra virgin olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Transfer the tagine to the oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the turkey is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Serve with a side of crusty bread or over couscous.
